parameters.name: scheduledEventId
parameters.description: ScheduledEvents Id. This is a GUID-formatted string (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000)

maintenancePlanId.description: Maintenance plan name if the update is part of a maintenance plan.

statusDetails.description: Update status details, includes failure reason and recovery step for the update (if any).

ConfigurationAssignmentFilterProperties.description: Azure query for the update configuration.

locations.description: List of locations to scope the query to.

ErrorDetails.description: An error response details received from the Azure Maintenance service.

code.description: Service-defined error code. This code serves as a sub-status for the HTTP error code specified in the response.

values.name: None
values.description: Pending updates has no impact on resource.

values.name: Freeze
values.description: Pending updates can freeze network or disk io operation on resource.

values.name: Restart
values.description: Pending updates can cause resource to restart.

values.name: Redeploy
values.description: Pending updates can redeploy resource.

InputLinuxParameters.description: Input properties for patching a Linux machine.

packageNameMasksToExclude.description: Package names to be excluded for patching.

packageNameMasksToInclude.description: Package names to be included for patching.

classificationsToInclude.description: Classification category of patches to be patched. Allowed values are 'Critical', 'Security', and 'Other'.

InputPatchConfiguration.description: Input configuration for a patch run

rebootSetting.description: Possible reboot preference as defined by the user based on which it would be decided to reboot the machine or not after the patch operation is completed.

windowsParameters.description: Input parameters specific to patching a Windows machine. For Linux machines, do not pass this property.

linuxParameters.description: Input parameters specific to patching Linux machine. For Windows machines, do not pass this property.

InputWindowsParameters.description: Input properties for patching a Windows machine.

kbNumbersToExclude.description: Windows KBID to be excluded for patching.

kbNumbersToInclude.description: Windows KBID to be included for patching.

classificationsToInclude.description: Classification category of patches to be patched. Allowed values are 'Critical', 'Security', 'UpdateRollup', 'FeaturePack', 'ServicePack', 'Definition', 'Tools', and 'Updates'.

properties.description: Gets or sets properties of the resource

location.description: Gets or sets location of the resource

tags.description: Gets or sets tags of the resource

namespace.description: Gets or sets namespace of the resource

extensionProperties.description: Gets or sets extensionProperties of the maintenanceConfiguration

maintenanceScope.description: Gets or sets maintenanceScope of the configuration

visibility.description: Gets or sets the visibility of the configuration. The default value is 'Custom'

installPatches.description: The input parameters to be passed to the patch run operation.

MaintenanceError.description: An error response received from the Azure Maintenance service.

MaintenancePlanProperties.description: Properties bag for the MaintenancePlan ARM proxy resource.

resourceId.description: The resourceId of the parent resource. This value is populated by the service based on the ARM resource path.

startTimeUTC.description: Start time of the maintenance plan in UTC.

endTimeUTC.description: End time of the maintenance plan in UTC.

updateScope.description: Scope of the maintenance plan (Ex: Flighting, AllProf etc.).

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: MaintenancePlan call was accepted, creation has completed successfully.

values.name: Failed
values.description: MaintenancePlan call was accepted, creation has failed.

values.name: FlightingNodeFirmwareUpdatesOnly
values.description: Apply only flighting firmware updates to nodes.

values.name: AllQualifiedUpdates
values.description: Apply all updates that are qualified for the supercomputer.

values.name: QualifiedNodeFirmwareUpdatesOnly
values.description: Apply only qualified firmware updates.

values.name: CriticalImpactlessUpdatesOnly
values.description: Apply only critical updates that are impactless.

values.name: CriticalImpactfulUpdatesOnly
values.description: Apply critical updates that may have visible customer impact.

MaintenanceScope.description: Gets or sets maintenanceScope of the configuration

values.name: Host
values.description: This maintenance scope controls installation of azure platform updates i.e. services on physical nodes hosting customer VMs.

values.name: Resource
values.description: This maintenance scope controls the default update maintenance of the Azure Resource

values.name: OSImage
values.description: This maintenance scope controls os image installation on VM/VMSS

values.name: Extension
values.description: This maintenance scope controls extension installation on VM/VMSS

values.name: InGuestPatch
values.description: This maintenance scope controls installation of windows and linux packages on VM/VMSS

values.name: SQLDB
values.description: This maintenance scope controls installation of SQL server platform updates.

values.name: SQLManagedInstance
values.description: This maintenance scope controls installation of SQL managed instance platform update.

startDateTime.description: Effective start date of the maintenance window in YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm format. The start date can be set to either the current date or future date. The window will be created in the time zone provided and adjusted to daylight savings according to that time zone.

expirationDateTime.description: Effective expiration date of the maintenance window in YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm format. The window will be created in the time zone provided and adjusted to daylight savings according to that time zone. Expiration date must be set to a future date. If not provided, it will be set to the maximum datetime 9999-12-31 23:59:59.

duration.description: Duration of the maintenance window in HH:mm format. If not provided, default value will be used based on maintenance scope provided. Example: 05:00.

timeZone.description: Name of the timezone. List of timezones can be obtained by executing [System.TimeZoneInfo]::GetSystemTimeZones() in PowerShell. Example: Pacific Standard Time, UTC, W. Europe Standard Time, Korea Standard Time, Cen. Australia Standard Time.

recurEvery.description: Rate at which a Maintenance window is expected to recur. The rate can be expressed as daily, weekly, or monthly schedules. Daily schedule are formatted as recurEvery: [Frequency as integer]['Day(s)']. If no frequency is provided, the default frequency is 1. Daily schedule examples are recurEvery: Day, recurEvery: 3Days.  Weekly schedule are formatted as recurEvery: [Frequency as integer]['Week(s)'] [Optional comma separated list of weekdays Monday-Sunday]. Weekly schedule examples are recurEvery: 3Weeks, recurEvery: Week Saturday,Sunday. Monthly schedules are formatted as [Frequency as integer]['Month(s)'] [Comma separated list of month days] or [Frequency as integer]['Month(s)'] [Week of Month (First, Second, Third, Fourth, Last)] [Weekday Monday-Sunday] [Optional Offset(No. of days)]. Offset value must be between -6 to 6 inclusive. Monthly schedule examples are recurEvery: Month, recurEvery: 2Months, recurEvery: Month day23,day24, recurEvery: Month Last Sunday, recurEvery: Month Fourth Monday, recurEvery: Month Last Sunday Offset-3, recurEvery: Month Third Sunday Offset6.

OperationsListResult.description: Result of the List Operations operation

nextLink.description: The link used to get the next page of operations.

ScheduledEventsAcknowledgeErrorDetails.description: An error response details received from the Azure Maintenance service for each ScheduledEvents.

target.description: ScheduledEvents Id. This is a GUID-formatted string (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000)

code.description: Status code for the ScheduledEvents acknowledge operation on the target ScheduledEvents Id.

ScheduledEventsListAcknowledgeError.description: An error response received from the Azure Maintenance service.

ScheduledEventsListAcknowledgeErrorDetai.description: An error response details received from the Azure Maintenance service.

code.description: Service-defined error code. This code serves as a sub-status for the HTTP error code specified in the response.

TagOperators.description: Filter VMs by Any or All specified tags.

TagSettingsProperties.description: Tag filter information for the VM.

tags.description: Dictionary of tags with its list of values.

filterOperator.description: Filter VMs by Any or All specified tags.

notBefore.description: Time when Azure will start force updates if not self-updated by customer before this time

values.name: Pending
values.description: There are pending updates to be installed.

values.name: InProgress
values.description: Updates installation are in progress.

values.name: Completed
values.description: All updates are successfully applied.

values.name: RetryNow
values.description: Updates installation failed but are ready to retry again.

values.name: RetryLater
values.description: Updates installation failed and should be retried later.

values.name: NoUpdatesPending
values.description: No updates are pending.

values.name: Cancel
values.description: Cancel the schedule and stop creating PMR for resources part of it. Applicable to Maintenance Configuration resource type only.

values.name: Cancelled
values.description: Send the Cancelled response to the user if request came to cancel the schedule. Applicable to Maintenance Configuration resource type only.

values.name: Failed
values.description: Updates installation failed.

values.name: None
values.description: Default value, no update status code provided.

values.name: Success
values.description: Update successfully applied.

values.name: TimedOut
values.description: Update has timed out.

values.name: NodeUnhealthy
values.description: Underlying node is unhealthy.

values.name: RolloutUnhealthy
values.description: Payload is unhealthy.

values.name: BakeTimeViolation
values.description: Wait for bake time period to expire.

values.name: ConcurrentUpdateLimitViolation
values.description: Cannot have these many updates going on concurrently; wait for some to finish.

values.name: SkippedByPlatform
values.description: Transient platform issue.

details.description: Represents the message providing details about the update.

code.description: Represents the code indicating the update status.

recoveryAction.description: Represents the step needed to take in case of recovery.

Visibility.description: Gets or sets the visibility of the configuration. The default value is 'Custom'

values.name: Custom
values.description: Only visible to users with permissions.

values.name: Public
values.description: Visible to all users.
